name: TestWaitForChangeCountGreater
title: TestWaitForChangeCountGreater
syntax: long TestWaitForChangeCountGreater(valueHandle * value, qword count, dword timeoutMs);
description: Waits for the change counter of a valueHandle to reach a certain value. Each valueHandle contains a change counter which is reset to 0 at measurement start and with explicit calls to valueHandle::ResetValueState. You can read out the counter with valueHandle::GetChangeCount.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value handle of a communication object or distributed object.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
